name: redteam-review produces a summary pack with both blue-team and red-team findings
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.findings.some(f=>f.lens==="blue")&&j.findings.some(f=>f.lens==="red")?0:1)' && echo w13-blue-red 1>&2
